member.name: T:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault
member.summary: Data class that contains meta-data relating to a specific component. See the Specification

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault.ComponentId
member.summary: As this is a generated component, not a 'real' one. It will always have Id = 255.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault.Name
member.summary: The name of this component.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault.DefaultProfile
member.summary: The default profile associated with this component. As this is a generated component rather than a 'real' one, this will always return null.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault.Properties
member.summary: Get the meta-data for all properties that are associated with this component.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.FiftyOne.Data.IFiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaData})
member.summary: Constructor
member.param: The meta-data for the properties associated with this component.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault.AddProperty(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.FiftyOne.Data.IFiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaData)
member.summary: Add the specified property meta-data to the list of properties associated with this component.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault.CompareTo(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.FiftyOne.Data.IComponentMetaData)
member.summary: Compare this instance to another object that implements .
member.returns: >0 if this instance precedes `other` in the sort order. 0 if they are equal in the sort order. <0 if `other` precedes this instance in the sort order.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault.Equals(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.FiftyOne.Data.IComponentMetaData)
member.summary: Check if this instance is equal to another object that implements .
member.returns: True if the two instances are equal. False otherwise

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault.GetProperties
member.summary: Get the meta-data for all properties associated with this component.
member.returns: An containing meta-data for all properties associated with this component.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault.GetProperty(System.String)
member.summary: Get the meta-data for the specified property.
member.param: The name of the property to get meta-data for.
member.returns: A meta-data instance for the requested property or null if no match was found.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault.GetHashCode
member.summary: Get the hash code for this instance.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Dispose of this instance.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.ComponentMetaDataDefault.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose of this instance.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault
member.summary: Data class that contains meta-data relating to a specific property. This variation is used for meta-data that is generated by the c# code rather than the native C/C++ code. For example, this is used to add placeholder property meta-data for the 'metrics' properties because they don't have any associated meta-data in the data file.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.Component
member.summary: The component associated with this property.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.DefaultValue
member.summary: Get the default value for this property

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.DisplayOrder
member.summary: A byte used to order property meta-data instances. For example when displaying a list of properties to a user.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.List
member.summary: True if this is a 'list' property. False if not. List properties can have multiple values on a single profile. For example, an Apple device such as the iPhone 8 has multiple model numbers - A1863, A1864, A1897, etc. Therefore the HardwareModelVariants property is a list property.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.Mandatory
member.summary: True if this property must be filled in. False if it can be left blank or 'Unknown'

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.Obsolete
member.summary: True if the property is obsolete. False otherwise. Obsolete properties are usually retained for some time for backwards compatibility but may be removed in a future release and should not be used if possible.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.Show
member.summary: True if 51Degrees recommends that the property should appear in lists shown to the user. False if not.
member.remarks: This is used by the 51Degrees Property Dictionary: https://51degrees.com/resources/property-dictionary and is made available for customers should they wish to make use of it.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.ShowValues
member.summary: True if 51Degrees recommends that all possible values of this property can be shown to the user. False if not. Properties that have very large lists of possible values will usually have this set to false.
member.remarks: This is used by the 51Degrees Property Dictionary: https://51degrees.com/resources/property-dictionary and is made available for customers should they wish to make use of it.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.Url
member.summary: A URL that will display a page with more detail about the property.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.Values
member.summary: Get a list of meta-data objects for all the possible values that exist for this property in the current data file. Note that as this instance is for meta-data that is generated from the c# code rather than the data file, this list will only even contain the default value and that many other values are possible.
Constructor
Constructor
member.exception: Thrown if a required parameter is null

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.GetComponent
member.summary: Get the meta-data for the component associated with this property. The component is the major logical grouping to which this property belongs. For example 'hardware device' or 'web browser'.
member.returns: An instance containing the details for the component this property belongs to.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.GetDefaultValue
member.summary: Get the meta-data for the default value for this property.
member.returns: An instance containing the details for the default value for this property.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.GetValue(System.String)
member.summary: Get the meta-data for the specified value for this property.
member.param: The name of the value to get the meta-data for.
member.returns: An instance containing the details for the specified value for this property. Null if the specified value was not found.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.GetValues
member.summary: Get a list of meta-data objects for all the possible values that exist for this property in the current data file. Note that as this instance is for meta-data that is generated from the c# code rather than the data file, this list will only even contain the default value and that many other values are possible.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.CompareTo(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.FiftyOne.Data.IFiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaData)
member.summary: Compare this instance to another object that implements .
member.returns: >0 if this instance precedes `other` in the sort order. 0 if they are equal in the sort order. <0 if `other` precedes this instance in the sort order.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.Equals(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.FiftyOne.Data.IFiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaData)
member.summary: Check if this instance is equal to another object that implements .
member.returns: True if the two instances are equal. False otherwise

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.Equals(System.String)
member.summary: Check if this instance is equal to the supplied string. This uses the Name property to check equality.
member.returns: True if the two instances are equal. False otherwise

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.OnPremise.Data.FiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaDataDefault.GetHashCode
member.summary: Get the hash code for this instance.

member.summary: Dispose
member.param: False if being called from finalizer.

member.summary: Dispose

member.name: T:FiftyOne.Did.Core.Data.I51DidData
member.summary: Contains IDs related to the user.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.Core.Data.I51DidData.IdProbGlobal
member.summary: Probabilistic 51Did, unique across all callers from the same device and network.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.Core.Data.I51DidData.IdProbLic
member.summary: Probabilistic 51Did, unique only across the caller’s license key.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.Did.Core.FlowElements.DidBaseEnginePropertiesBuilder
member.summary: Helper class that builds metadata for both OnPremise and Cloud versions of 51Did engine.

member.summary: Category name for the data.
